The Garfield Movie (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $91,956,547Details
International Box Office $163,451,139
Worldwide Box Office $255,407,686
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,420,323
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,211,667
Total $2,631,990
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Garfield, the world-famous, Monday-hating, lasagna-loving indoor cat, is about to have a wild outdoor adventure! After an unexpected reunion with his long-lost father—scruffy street cat Vic—Garfield and his canine friend Odie are forced from their perfectly pampered life into joining Vic in a high-stakes heist.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$24,006,629 (26.1% of total gross)
Legs:3.83 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:36.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$60,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,035 opening theaters/4,108 max. theaters, 5.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $97,241,402

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 24th, 2024 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: May 1st, 2024 (Wide), released as Garfield (Spain)
May 1st, 2024 (Wide), released as Garfield - Fora de Casa (Brazil)
May 1st, 2024 (Wide), released as Garfield: Fuera de Casa (Mexico)
May 1st, 2024 (Wide), released as Garfield: Una Missione Gustosa (Italy)
May 2nd, 2024 (Wide) (Central America)
Video Release: July 9th, 2024 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for action/peril and mild thematic elements.
(Rating bulletin 2824 (cert #54291), 3/6/2024)
Running Time: 101 minutes
Franchise: Garfield
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead
Filming location (country): United Kingdom
Plot point: Fugitive / On the Run, Heist, Talking Animals
Social setting: Family Reunion
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Alcon Entertainment, Columbia Pictures, Prime Focus World, One Cool Group Limited, Wayfarer Studios, DNEG Animation, Stage 6 Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Garfield, the world-famous, Monday-hating, lasagna-loving indoor cat, is about to have a wild outdoor adventure! After an unexpected reunion with his long-lost father—scruffy street cat Vic—Garfield and his canine friend Odie are forced from their perfectly pampered life into joining Vic in a high-stakes heist.
